introSection: Woodstock Express is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened in 2002 as Zig Zag.

In 2011, it was renamed Scratch as part of the brand-wide music rebranding of the Walibi parks.

For the 2016 season, the ride was rethemed to Woodstock Express during the creation of the new Explorer Adventure themed area with the construction of a new facade.

fullText:
Woodstock Express is a steel wild mouse roller coaster located at Walibi Rhône-Alpes in Les Avenières, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

The ride opened in 2002 as Zig Zag.

In 2011, it was renamed Scratch as part of the brand-wide music rebranding of the Walibi parks.

For the 2016 season, the ride was rethemed to Woodstock Express during the creation of the new Explorer Adventure themed area with the construction of a new facade.
